title: Waiver Log Entry
description: A formal waiver record documenting the decision to waive a gate criterion, including justification, conditions, and residual risk acceptance.

gate.description: Gate for which this waiver applies

criterion.description: The specific gate criterion being waived

justification.description: Formal justification for granting the waiver — must be substantive

requested_by.description: Person or role requesting the waiver

approved_by.description: Person or role who approved the waiver (must have appropriate authority)

expiry_date.description: Date when the waiver expires and must be reviewed or renewed

conditions.description: Conditions attached to the waiver that must be fulfilled

risk_accepted.description: Whether the approver has formally accepted the residual risk

residual_risk.description: Level of residual risk accepted by granting this waiver

gate_review_id.description: Reference to the gate review record in which this waiver was granted
